content:
Reference reply from 14: <think>He means "that's all there was to the evaluation" - the doctor just ended it right there after she couldn't recall the 3 words. That's what he's frustrated about.</think>
That's bullshit. The evaluation was basically truncated after the hardest part under the worst conditions, and they're going to use that data to make decisions about her disability status?
You have every right to push back. Request a full evaluation. Document what you just told me — the math consistent error (subtrac
